entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano ,

Hope You are doing Well,

Could you please share the campaign code for the Global Certification? 

Thank you for your time and support.

Best regards,

entry.title: Badi MD_EXT_SUP is not triggered in MD01n - MRP Live
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are trying to update the issuing storage location while transferring the stock between two internal storage locations. Right now in the purchase requisition the issue storage location is shown as blank.

Even after maintaining the special procurement type  config BADI is not triggering. Can you let me know if there is any option to update the issuing storage location in MD01 ?

Regards,

Manoj

entry.title: Re: T-code for clearing Gl account
entry.content: I mean account is not managed on an open item basis.

entry.title: Using Submit to call the program RM08RELEASE
entry.content:
So I'm trying to call the program RM08RELEASE or Transaction MRBR using the SUBMIT button. However, I'm not sure how do I include this MRBR options in the SUBMIT syntax. I want to Manually Release all the Invoices with Manual Payment Block.

 

 

 

SUBMIT RM08RELEASE
WITH SO_BUKRS = IT_VENDOR-BUKRS
WITH SO_GJAHR = P_GJAHR
WITH SO_LIFNR = P_LIFNR
AND RETURN.

entry.title: Inspection lot blocking in APO
entry.content:
We have used User exit APOCF011 for stocks which blocks incoming stock from ECC to APO as and when required with a custom validation table during PPDS optimizer run to give optimizer a constant stock values, But what is happening now is When the inspection lot gets posted to  unrestricted stock from ECC the stock value doesn't gets updated to APO side as we have blocked the  incoming STOCK and it shows shortage of stock in RRP3, So now i want block incoming Inspection lots also but i am not able to find any USER exit available from APO SIDE,

I found 2 BAdi's in APO but not sure where to impellent it or call it in which program, Can someone help?

these are the BADi's i have found.

/sapapo/lnsplot

/sapapo/cif_enhance

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
I identify as a person in the below categories:

    • People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts 
    • Minorities who may not have equal opportunity in their geographic location 
    • First generation college students
    • People looking to switch their careers mid-life

I am willing to learn more about SAP and to undergo the rigors of studying for SAP Certification. I have completed my first learning journey Project Manage SAP S/4 Hana Implementation and I awaiting my certification attempt

Thank you

entry.title: Purchase order date change in APO With User Exit
entry.content: We have one enhancement where we are blocking incoming Purchase orders for sometime with a validation table during PPDS optimizer run with user EXIT APOCF006, Now i want to change PO date in APO using this exit I saw it has Date and GR processing time in that exit, SAP Documentation says we can create, change. delete PO  with the help of this user exit , So if i change the PO date with the help of this User exit then will it publish to changes to R/3 Side also? I don't want publish them in R/3 side . I only want to have the change in APO side.

entry.title: Re: Generate Booked Data based on attribute
entry.content:
something like this:

MEMBERSET [d/Product] = %Product%
MEMBERSET [d/Scenario] = %SCN1%
MEMBERSET [d/Entity].[p/Scoped] = "YES"

DATA() = 1 - 1

entry.title: Re: Undeploy or Delete OPC UA Server (shop floor system)
entry.content:
Hi @jaymz

Glad to hear that😀

 

Regards,
Kartik Singhal

entry.title: Quering an OData Endpoint with a timestamp does not work in CDS
entry.content:
Hi,

I wrote a CAP service which is communicating with C4C via OData.

In the service I  want to read all BusinessPartner with a certain ChangeDate.

The pure OData Call will be:

https://myXXXXX.crm.ondemand.com/sap/c4c/odata/v1/c4codataapi/BusinessPartnerCollection?$filter=EntityLastChangedOn ge datetimeoffset'2024-01-10T06:35:38.1533450Z'

In my service I wrote:

const c4cBuPaService = await cds.connect.to("c4c_bupa");
const allBuPa = await c4cBuPaService.run(SELECT(["AccountID", "ContactID"]).from("ContactCollection").where(`ChangedOn > datetimeoffset'${myDate.toISOString()}'`.toString()));
        This leads to an error, because with CDS icompiles the statement to
....$filter=EntityLastChangedOn ge 'datetimeoffset'2024-01-10T06:35:38.1533450Z''

So, the datetimeoffset is enclosed in quotation marks.
I tried all various options to change it, no success.

So my question would be: How to query a timestamp in CDS?

Thanks
Jens

entry.title: Re: How to find package S4HANA2023CORE HANA DB Export 1
entry.content:
Hi Nicole,

Have u found the S4HANA2023CORE HANA DB Export 1 file.

Please suggest me how to find S4HANA2023CORE HANA DB Export 1 file. Suggest me path on service market place.

entry.title: Re: T-code for clearing Gl account
entry.content:
So what do you exactly mean by clearing these accounts, what is your 'target' ?

To change the G/L account to open items management, you need to use an interim account to transfer postings to make the account balance zero, switch on open item management, run program RFSEPA02 (copy to a Z program), transfer back the balance from interim account.

Then F-31

entry.title: Re: ALV grid no sum toolbar button
entry.content:
there is spelling mistake in modify fieldcat 

ls_fieldcat-do_sum = 'X'.
modify lt_fieldcat from ls_fielcat.

line 2 - ls_fieldcat

entry.title: Re: Review booklet tab does not appear on manage kpis and...
entry.content: Thank you for your answer. I have copied the business catalogue SAP_CORE_BC_EXT_RVB_PC and created a new one. However, I still do not see the button "review booklet". Have you got any ideas on how to solve this? Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Using Submit to call the program RM08RELEASE
entry.content:
I guess your question is not specific to this program, but to all programs with radio buttons.

So, taking the program RM08RELEASE as an example, Release Manually is PA_XMANU and Release Automatically is PA_XAUTO, if you want to select the button automatically, you pass WITH PA_XMANU = ' ' WITH PA_XAUTO = 'X' (indicate all the fields of the same group of radio buttons).

entry.content:
We have used User exit APOCF011 for stocks which blocks incoming stock from ECC to APO as and when required with a custom validation table during PPDS optimizer run to give optimizer a constant stock values, But what is happening now is When the inspection lot gets posted to  unrestricted stock from ECC the stock value doesn't gets updated to APO side as we have blocked the  incoming STOCK and it shows shortage of stock in RRP3, So now i want block incoming Inspection lots also but i am not able to find any USER exit available from APO SIDE,

I found 2 BAdi's in APO but not sure where to impellent it or call it in which program, Can someone help?

these are the BADi's i have found.

entry.title: Re: SD/EWM Real Open Quantities in Sales Schedule Agreement / Schedule Lines
entry.content: HI, you have to check the ATP (Available to promise) settings. If you want to reconfirm from one salesorder to another have also a look at the BOP (backorder processing). Kind regards Robert

entry.title: Re: Simple generic popup selection screen for quick input or output
entry.content: Thanks for sharing this piece of art, with this class it is easier to create a selection screen, for a simple use as a popup to confirm or set data it is a good choice. Now I use it some time, when I need a series of values ​​that must be chosen by the user and connect a field with a dropdown list with value automatically retrieved from the domain.

entry.title: Review booklet tab does not appear on manage kpis and reports app
entry.content:
I I would like to create a review booklet according to this blog. However, I do not see a "Review boolket" button above the screen next to "Stories". 

I have created a new role that includes the business catalogue SAP_CORE_BC_EXT_RVB_PC and asssigned to a user. However I still cannot see a button "Review boolket". How can I make it appear?

Thank you very much in advance!

Review Booklet Designer (Concept and Adaptability)... - SAP Community

entry.title: ABAP PLATFORM Standalone?
entry.content:
Hi all,

in the past it was possible to get a licence for "SAP NETWEAVER AS ABAP" and run it standalone as a ABAP stack on premise. With the movement to S/4HANA there is not the "ABAP PLATFORM".

Question: Is it also possible to run the "ABAP PLATFORM" standalone without the ERP layer on top? Or is it only possible to get it in combination with S/4HANA?

Best, Bartho.

entry.title: Re: Which products are addressed in the SAP Activate methodology for the Intelligent Enterprise road
entry.content:
thank you. Can I ask you

Which additional scope option does the strategic advisory service for cloud analytics offer? Note: There are 2 correct answers to this question
A . Extended package
B . SAP S/4HANA for central finance
C . Baseline package
D . SAP Activate methodology for the Intelligent Enterprise

entry.title: Re: Inproces inspection result recording
entry.content:
Greetings,

I don't think you can prevent operation confirmation if results are not recorded per standard but I am sure you could develop some additional logic. Partial confirmations are possible.

You can use multiple sampling functionality in sampling procedure. Depending on the result the system will increase sample size. Depending on the configuration you might need to use sampling scheme or not.

Best regards, Matjaž.

entry.title: Re: Initial value of 0FISCPER is replaced wrongly
entry.content: Hi, we changed the code here and it works. And we will check some notes to verify if we have to redesign our coding concerning exit-variables. Thanks for your help so far. Regards, Peter

entry.title: Re: Forecast Layout with Input control Cut over date
entry.content:
Hi, 

This is a really old thread but I faced the exactly similar issue yesterday and the resolution was rather unexpected.

Starting point: story with multiple tabs. I had to do some layout (just layout, not logic) edits to multiple pages of the story. At some point I noticed that cut-over date selection (in planning page)  had broken with exactly same error message. It was not possible to get it working by re-creating. Switching to "today" however worked.

After some hours of investigation I noticed that the selection gets broken when I enter another tab (let's call it comparison page) during the edit mode. No need to do any edits, just enter it in edit mode. If I didn't enter that page (comparison page), the selection did not get broken (in planning page). You read right: entering in edit mode in another tab was breaking the cut-over selection in another tab(!)

The issue turned out to be a broken graph component in comparison page. When I removed the broken graph component, the issue went completely away and already broken cut-over date selection started working.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One Client install on Azure Remote Desktop
entry.content: Our company run SAP Business One in Azure Virtual Desktop. It is basically the same as a terminal server or remote desktop setup. However there is quite a lot to learn with Azure Virtual Desktop if you want to do it well and for it to be reliable. Our company is a Microsoft Partner and of you wanted to we could have an initial conversation about your goals and how we can help you.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One Client install on Azure Remote Desktop
entry.content: To answer your domain authentication question, it is possible to connect from a non domain PC but you need to Authenticate to the domain first in some way.

entry.title: How to notify multiple users?
entry.content:
Hello,

I don't know if this is even possible, but I'm trying to create an app in SAP Build Apps, and I need a button to send a notification to everyone in the user's friend group when they click the button. Bonus points if it can override silent mode and do not disturb

If this isn't possible with SAP Build Apps, could anyone recommend me another app builder that does have this function? It's a crucial part of the app I'm trying to make.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: How to manually set message tatus in CPI MessageProcessingLog?
entry.content: Is there any option to set Message status for example from Headers and make it as FAILED even if message ends with "END MESSAGE" ?

entry.title: WPT issue for Single Warehouse is assigned with a plant having multiple Sloc
entry.content:
Hi Team,


As per business requirement we have maintained one warehouse with a plant having multiple storage location. So while fetching the WPT -Warehouse process type, will be challenging for same products will be going to "Multiple Sloc for the same Plant". Please help us with this scenario.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: WPT issue for Single Warehouse is assigned with a pla...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I will be more interested in the requirement why two(/multiple) GR ZONE is required for one warehouse.

But it is possible to determine different destination Storage bin during putaway according to the plant and storage location.

Eg. It is possible to define unrestricted used stock as F1, F2, F3…. To different plants and locations.

 

Then determine the putaway stratergies with customizings "Specify Storage Type Search Seauence for Putaway" and "Optimize Access Strategy for Storage type search : Putaway", you can also consider BADI Storage Type Search Sequence and Putaway Rule Change - /SCWM/EX4_CORE_PTS_TYPSQ.

 

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: Custom Alert for different periods
entry.content: Thank you, Piyush

entry.title: Re: Which is preferred : SAP Certified Enterprise Architect OR TOGAF Certified EA ?
entry.content:
If I may add from my experience (having earned both SAP EA Architect and TOGAF 8/9 certifications)...

So, my observation from last 20 years of SAP experience is that TOGAF and traditional SAP EA frameworks have historically been more aligned with on-premise implementations. TOGAF, while powerful in creating structured enterprise architecture, can sometimes feel rigid and cumbersome in fast-evolving cloud environments like SAP Public Cloud or Private Cloud.

In cloud implementations, flexibility, speed, and adaptability are key. This is where tools like LeanIX and SAP Signavio offer a significant advantage. LeanIX, for instance, is designed for managing cloud-native architectures, providing real-time insights into the application landscape, dependencies, and risks. Its lightweight, agile approach aligns with the needs of cloud deployments, where rapid iterations and scaling are critical.

SAP Signavio supports business process management and helps streamline process optimization and transformation—especially useful in SAP S/4HANA implementations, including Public Cloud scenarios. By focusing on process intelligence and customer-centric design, it helps businesses adapt more quickly to cloud dynamics.

While TOGAF and SAP EA still offer valuable governance and structured approaches for overarching enterprise architecture (especially in hybrid or larger, long-term strategic contexts), LeanIX and Signavio are more suitable for the rapid, agile, and evolving nature of cloud-based environments. They provide more real-time, adaptable solutions that align with cloud deployment models.

So, for a cloud-focused enterprise, inclination toward LeanIX and Signavio is quite logical, as these tools offer more modern, cloud-friendly capabilities compared to the traditional TOGAF and SAP EA frameworks.

Happy Friday 🙂
Aleksander Godzilo-Godlewski

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio Process Manager - Attribute Visualizatio...
entry.content:
Hello Damaris,

a few weeks ago I had a similar problem. I solved it by reusing the attribute I wanted to visualise on the BPMN object. See the screenshot below. (Sorry, it is in German) There you can see that this attribute is used in the glossary and in the BPMN objects. When you do this, the attribute appears in the visualisation context menu and you can use it.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: PR requisitioner validation table?
entry.content:
Hi @scottcarricknwn 

Seems the given message is custom. to verify further, please click on 'technical Information' icon as highlighted in the attached image for better understanding.

Normally PR 'Requisitioner' field is a free field. Please try to verify keyboard 'F4' option in that field for any possible entries may designed for the field and go for the available options.
Please revert with your update.

Kind regards,

Julian Kuipers

entry.title: Re: Using Submit to call the program RM08RELEASE
entry.content: It's not an ABAP question. You are asking why standard MRBR requires to select "blocked due to variances" when "release automatically" is selected.

entry.title: Re: How to do a XML to JSON mapping
entry.content: This is because your json schema is missing some elements, try this one;

entry.title: Re: How to do a XML to JSON mapping
entry.content: { "openapi": "3.0.0", "info": { "title": "Employee API", "version": "1.0.0" }, "paths": { "/employees": { "get": { "summary": "Get list of employees", "responses": { "200": { "description": "A list of employees", "content": { "application/json": { "schema": { "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Employees" } } } } } } } }, "components": { "schemas": { "Employees": { "type": "object", "properties": { "Employee": { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "object", "properties": { "displayName": { "type": "string" }, "firstName": { "type": "string" }, "lastName": { "type": "string" }, "managerName": { "type": "string" }, "managerEmail": { "type": "string", "format": "email" }, "managerSCIMID": { "type": "string", "format": "uuid" }, "mobilePhone": { "type": "string" }, "email": { "type": "string", "format": "email" }, "SAMAccountName": { "type": "string" }, "userPrincipalName": { "type": "string" } } } } } } } } }

entry.title: Re: Unable to create material master due to Accounting1 e...
entry.content:
Hi @Saurabh_2804 

Normally Termination error (ABAP run time error) should not come in the system.
Termination Issues happens due to custom development code or Improper authorization matrix.
Try to create material again. Once termination happens, request ABAPer to check in ST22 t-code for the root cause.

entry.title: Feature Request: Define custom colour palette in Signavio Process Intelligence
entry.content:
Hi,

we would like to raise a feature request which enables us to define our own colour palette within Signavio Process Intelligence:

 

We would like to be able to match the palettes with our corporate colours - in the same way as we are already able to do in Signavio Process Manager. 

Thank you,

Anna

entry.title: Re: Subcontracting process return of goods - MB04
entry.content:
Hi @Wesleypcruz 

Correction of Vendor invoice can be done through the t-code: MIRO
MIRO > Subsequent Credit - For decreasing the vendor Invoice value without quantity.
MIRO > Subsequent Debit - For Increasing the vendor Invoice value without quantity.
Please revert with your update.

entry.title: change the fix 的接口标准报文是什么？
entry.content: https://my200060-api.s4hana.sapcloud.cn/sap/bc/srt/scs_ext/sap/fixedassetchange

entry.content: <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-envelope" xmlns:fi="http://sap.com/xi/FI-AA" xmlns:yy1="http://SAPCustomFields.com/YY1_">

entry.title: Re: How to restrict the editing of a form template?
entry.content: Dear customer, you can restrict the access and take the form template maintenance view away. Or do you want to restrict to edit the output settings before releasing or submit a document. Is it that what you are looking for ?

entry.title: Re: BYD2405 Cannot assign logon certificate
entry.content: Dear customer kindly have a look into the existing KBA https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3226460

entry.title: Re: Which products are addressed in the SAP Activate methodology for the Intelligent Enterprise road
entry.content:
A) Extended package
C) Baseline package

It's quite easy to find correct answers, Google is your friend 🙂

To facilitate the adoption of SAP Cloud products, several services and tools are available. One example is the Strategic Advisory Service for Analytics.
The service is offered in three scope options:

  • Baseline Package: This introductory option socializes in-depth advisory services with the customer. In a quick assessment, high-level opportunities and quick wins are identified.

  • Enhanced package: This intermediate service initiates in-depth analytics with a transformation road map. The package includes a baseline service scope, value proposition, analytics capability formulation, and recommendations for governance, standards, architecture, and project execution.

  • Extended package: This enhanced service scope provides ongoing support. A dedicated analytics advisor is assigned as the central contact for all discussions about analytics solutions from SAP, and manages related initiatives to deliver business value for medium- and long-term execution.

I wanted to understand what are the different OfflineOdata Headers used in MDK like OfflineOdata.TransactionId, their usages. I didn't find any specific details about it, hence asking here.

How these can be used in MDK/SSAM app.

entry.title: Re: Integration Between SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud - Blog 4
entry.content:
@Gem_Regan Thank you for this informative and helpful blog!

Is it possible to trigger an automatic data import into SAC upon a data update in Datasphere by utilizing the Multi Action API? Maybe you can help me with this question.

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: How to solve simple requirement with RAP, Fiori Eleme...
entry.content: @pfoehn There are no other answers except mine

entry.title: Re: How to solve simple requirement with RAP, Fiori Eleme...
entry.content:
Dear Patrick

Thank you for taking the time to answer to my post. I appreciate it.

Review of your solution:

Acutally my first attempt was a lot like yours with pure Fiori Elements and Preview in ADT, only I used V4 GUI (wonder why you used V2?). 

I also used "fake" internal create, update, delete operations on a "fake" Employee Table (in your case zpw_empl) in the behaviour defintion, as it is a must that the root entity (Employee) is defined in the behaviour definiton. 

What I miss in your solution is the business requirement to have a list of employees first  from a HCM System (Tables PAxxxx, SAP delivered or Custom CDS does not matter), where you can filter and select an EXISTING employee and only then the object page with a list of uploaded documents for that selected employee. Instead you display just a list of uploaded documents with associated emplyoee data from a table/cds (zpw_empl) that does not exist in HCM. Thus in your solution there will be no entry in the list, if the employee has no documents. 

Please see my attached screenshot (Fiori Elements with ADT Preview of RAP with V4 GUI).  And then the odyssey began!

I will of course try out your V2 solution (with my specific requirements) and let you know how this worked out.

Kind regards
Paul

PS:
To complete this real life business case I have to 2 more requirements (among others)
which give me a headache with RAP, Fiori Elements and FPM:

1) I need a value help on the field "LZ" in the List (see attachement) which will
    display a "hierarchy" (there are many hierarchies in FI und HCM).
    If the End User selects a "father" Node (LZ) of this hierarchy, the list of employees
    must show all employees of the father node (if any) including those who belong to a
    "child" Nodes. 
2) Depending on the user starting up the App the list of employees will always be
    filtered according to this "structural" Authorization (hint: in HCM HRP1001),
    this is again a Hierarchy. If the user is defined as "HR Document Administrator" to a      node, he is able to add, delete, create document for users belonging to that node
    (and child  nodes). Can't be solved with standard access control.

entry.title: Re: How to solve simple requirement with RAP, Fiori Eleme...
entry.content: Pls check again, sent it right now

Thanks for your support

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Seeking Support to Achieve My Dream: SAP HCM Associate Certificate

As an aspiring SAP HCM professional, I am on a journey to deepen my skills and knowledge in the world of SAP. Over the past year, I have transitioned from an SAP ABAP developer role into an SAP HCM consultant position. This shift has allowed me to explore the intricate workings of Human Capital Management and develop hands-on experience with SAP's comprehensive solutions.

In my current role, I have gained valuable experience in understanding the complexities of SAP HCM, such as personnel administration, organizational management, and time management. However, to further my professional growth and truly solidify my foundation, I am keen on earning the SAP HCM Associate Certification. Achieving this certification would not only validate my skills but also open new opportunities for career advancement and allow me to contribute more effectively to my organization.

Unfortunately, due to financial constraints, I am unable to afford the cost of the certification. I am reaching out to the SAP community and certification bodies to seek support for obtaining this valuable credential. I believe that with a certification, I can maximize my potential and continue contributing to SAP HCM projects with confidence and expertise.

Why Am I a Worthy Candidate?

  • Passion for SAP HCM: I am passionate about leveraging SAP technology to optimize HR processes and improve organizational efficiency. I consistently invest time in self-learning through available online resources, webinars, and hands-on practice.

  • Practical Experience: With my background as an SAP ABAP developer and my current role as an SAP HCM consultant, I have acquired a blend of technical and functional skills. This combination enables me to approach SAP HCM problems with a holistic perspective, bridging the gap between technical development and business requirements.

  • Commitment to Professional Growth: Despite financial challenges, I remain dedicated to advancing my career and skill set. The SAP HCM certification would serve as a catalyst for my professional development and would enable me to deliver better outcomes for clients and projects.

How Can SAP and the Community Support Me?

I am requesting assistance in the form of a scholarship or sponsorship to cover the certification cost. By investing in me, SAP or any supporting organization would not only be helping an individual achieve their goals but also contributing to the growth of the SAP community by enabling a committed professional to flourish.

Thank you for taking the time to read my story. I remain hopeful that I will find a way to achieve this certification and continue my journey as an SAP HCM consultant. Your support would be greatly appreciated, and I promise to pay it forward by helping others in similar situations once I am in a position to do so.

Sincerely,
Yeswanthraj Krishnan.

entry.title: Re: Editable DataTable Issue on List Picker
entry.content:
@bill_froelich ok thanks.

what about the reset field problem as I showed ?

Am I doing something wrong ?

entry.title: Re: How to solve simple requirement with RAP, Fiori Eleme...
entry.content:
OData V4 is fine, of course. I just wanted to spare the draft handling for the demo.

"Thus in your solution there will be no entry in the list, if the employee has no documents. " => No, it will also show employees with no documents

entry.title: Cost Itemization for project is different in the standard report
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

i'm planning a component in CJ20n ad the value is correct in the cost itemization view.

From CJ20n menu -- cost itemization for network

If i run the standard report S_ALR_87013542 planned value is different (60 eur instead of 90 eur)

Any Idea about this system behaviour ? Did you face some note about this issue ?

BR

M

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi My name is Thuto Michelle Klaas, I am interested in the free SAP training as a young black female in the Tech Industry. I am currently a Business Analyst at a real estate company and believe that SAP training will enable me to have more knowledge to offer to my company and in future if I choose to leave for another job. I also am aware that in my current role I work a lot with procurement related projects and I know SAP has a of of products that touch base with that and that would upskill me and help me stand out.

I am willing and ready to learn SAP skills and be certified in it

entry.title: Re: Show more than one currency in the same planning view
entry.content:
Hi,

Exchange rate key figure used in calculation is conversion enabled. Please try if below works

Create a new attribute as key figure in Exchange rate MDT or a new key figure Exchange Rate at MTHCURRCURRTO1 planning level. Make sure MTHCURRCURRTO1 planning level doesn't have conversion source & conversion target marked. Then use this new key figure in the calculation where you want to display both target currency.

Regards,

Piyush

entry.title: Re: What is a Pacemaker Work center in capacity schedulin...
entry.content:
Hello @Souhail_ 

As per the note 3465004 - F3770: Schedule Production app/ Capacity Scheduling table does not display data

Pacemaker Workcenter is the bottleneck resource, this workcenter must be maintained as the Production Line under Production Version of a material.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Tech Day: dive into the latest innovations in SAP BTP, SAC, Datasphere and more
entry.content:
Who are we?

We are a group of motivated developers and data experts, passionate about SAP, BTP, analytics and developing awesome applications! With this event we want to bring together people with a similar mindset, looking to explore SAP’s latest offerings and gain new insights.

 

What to expect?

  • Arrive at 12:30 PM for lunch and meet your fellow attendees.
  • At 1:30 PM we’ll kick off the afternoon with a keynote that will inspire you for the rest of the program.
  • After the keynote, we’ll split up in different tracks: Analytics & Integration, Extensions, and a Trending track. Have a look at the complete program here.
  • At 3:00 PM we'll hold a sweet break where you can talk with the experts.
  • At around 5:45 PM we'll call it a day, grab a drink (you can even participate in a beer tasting) and a bite and start connecting.

 

Practical information

Date: November 7, from 12:30 till 19:30

Location: Palm Brewery (De Hoorn) | Steenhuffeldorp 3, 1840 Londerzeel

 

Who can attend?

Flexso Tech Day is free to attend for every SAP developer and BI expert looking to stay up to date with the latest SAP technologies and network with like-minded spirits. Places are limited though, so register now and be sure of your spot!

 

We hope to see you there!

entry.title: Re: Couldn't drop a table or view from HDI artifacts in SAP CAP
entry.content: Hi Fernando, Ive sent it through to you .. Ta,

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to remove a material extension from a...
entry.content:
Hi

 

Please go through this thread it seems related to your question

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/delete-the-distribution-channel-from-material-master/qaq-p/10866990

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Re: Periodic Billing Plan with yearly Value
entry.content:
Hi,

1、You can define a condition type named like [ZPSV] with Calculate type as [C].

2、Define a date rule as quarterly  billing

3、Set settlement period as a year。

4、Set the material price as 250 USD

Then you any quarterly billing 250 USD.

You can try!

entry.title: Re: ABAP Platform Trial 1909 Available Now
entry.content:
@Bartho 

thanks for refreshing this topic!
Please see my comment from June 2024:

ABAP Platform Trial 1909 Available Now - Page 2 - SAP Community

Kind regards, Stephan

entry.title: Re: Can I release 0FI_ACDOCA_10 for ODP myself?
entry.content: Running report BS_ANLY_DS_RELEASE_ODP did the trick. Now the extractors are released for ODP.

entry.title: Roobet промокод: nttcasino - Как получить бесплатные деньги на Roobet?
entry.content:
Промокод RoobetДетали
Roobet промокодnttcasino
Тип предложенияПриветственное предложение
Бесплатная ставкаБесплатная ставка на $5
Кэшбэк20% кэшбэк на проигрыши
Срок действия7 дней
АктивацияВведите промокод "nttcasino" при регистрации или в разделе с акциями для участия в предложении.

 

Roobet стремится привлечь новых игроков заманчивым приветственным предложением, доступным исключительно с использованием промокода Roobet "nttcasino". Чтобы получить право, просто активируйте предложение и выполните требования по ставкам. Эта акция предоставляет бесплатную ставку в размере 5 долларов США вместе с 20% кэшбэком на проигрыши, действительную в течение 7 дней.

Как получить бесплатные деньги на Roobet?
Используйте промокод Roobet: "nttcasino", чтобы разблокировать бесплатные предложения, такие как бесплатная ставка в размере 5 долларов США.

Что такое промокод Roobet без депозита?
Промокод Roobet: "nttcasino" предлагает бонусы без депозита, такие как бесплатные ставки и кэшбэк.

Какой код для регистрации Roobet?
Во время регистрации используйте промокод Roobet: "nttcasino" для эксклюзивных наград.

Как использовать свой код Roobet?
Введите промокод Roobet: «nttcasino» при регистрации или в разделе акций, чтобы получить его.

Почему Roobet запрещен в США?

Roobet запрещен в США из-за строгих правил азартных игр в Интернете.

В какой стране Roobet легален?
Roobet легален в таких странах, как Канада, Мексика и Бразилия.

Какой промокод Roobet на 2024 год?
Промокод Roobet на 2024 год — «nttcasino» для бесплатных ставок и предложений кэшбэка.

entry.title: Re: Add action button on Custom Business Object exposed a...
entry.content:
Hello!

I am unsure with your version if you can call the BAPI directly inside the Implementation method of your action, implemented in the Behaviour Implementation Class. 

If not, you will have to create a Class and method to call the BAPI and expose it as C1 to call it inside your RAP Behaviour Implementation.

The only tricky thing is the commit that you need to perform. For that, we came up with a workaround by wrapping the BAPI in a custom RFC function module, similar to this (this is for Planned Order creation but the logic is the same):

CALL FUNCTION 'ZPP_FM_CUTSIZE_CREATE_ORDER'

STARTING NEW TASK 'Z_ORDER'

DESTINATION 'NONE'

CALLING response_action ON END OF TASK

EXPORTING

logical_system = mv_logsys

order_type = '5'

ext_number_assignment = 'X'

commit_control = 'E' "E

strategy_profile = ls_strategy_profile

event_control = '1'

planning_mode_usage = '1'

TABLES

order_head = lt_order_head

order_structure = lt_order_structure

order_components = lt_order_components

characteristics_val_io = lt_characteristics_val_io

order_modes = lt_o_mode

mapping_data = lt_mapping_data

return = lt_ret

extension_in = lt_extension_in

CHANGING

cv_complete = lv_is_complete

EXCEPTIONS

communication_failure = 1

system_failure = 2

OTHERS = 3.

WAIT UNTIL lv_is_complete EQ abap_true.

response action method to receive the result:

METHOD response_action.

 

DATA lt_mapping_data TYPE TABLE OF bapi10503ordmapreto.

 

RECEIVE RESULTS FROM FUNCTION 'ZPP_FM_CREATE_ORDER'

IMPORTING return = mt_bapi_create_ret

mapping_data = lt_mapping_data .

 

READ TABLE lt_mapping_data ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_mapping_data>) INDEX 1.

CHECK <fs_mapping_data> IS ASSIGNED.

mv_planned_order = <fs_mapping_data>-order_number.

 

 

ENDMETHOD.



code inside ZPP_FM_CREATE_ORDER:

 

 

CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_MOSRVAPS_SAVETMPLPPM' DESTINATION 'NONE'

EXPORTING

logical_system = logical_system

order_type = order_type

ext_number_assignment = ext_number_assignment

commit_control = commit_control

strategy_profile = strategy_profile

planning_mode_usage = planning_mode_usage

event_control = event_control

TABLES

order_head = order_head

order_structure = order_structure

order_components = order_components

characteristics_val_io = characteristics_val_io

characteristics_val_act = characteristics_val_act

order_modes = order_modes

mapping_data = mapping_data

return = return

extension_in = extension_in

EXCEPTIONS

communication_failure = 1

system_failure = 2

OTHERS = 3.

 

IF sy-subrc NE 0.

DATA ls_ret TYPE bapiret2.

MOVE sy-msgid TO ls_ret-id.

MOVE sy-msgno TO ls_ret-number.

MOVE sy-msgty TO ls_ret-type.

MOVE sy-msgv1 TO ls_ret-message_v1.

MOVE sy-msgv2 TO ls_ret-message_v2.

MOVE sy-msgv3 TO ls_ret-message_v3.

MOVE sy-msgv4 TO ls_ret-message_v4.

 

MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE sy-msgty NUMBER sy-msgno INTO ls_ret-message

WITH sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4.

APPEND ls_ret TO return.

ENDIF.

 

cv_complete = abap_true.

 

 

Let me know if this helps you in any case. We have implemented it and it works well. I can try to help if you need further help 🙂

entry.title: Re: Can I release 0FI_ACDOCA_10 for ODP myself?
entry.content: SAP note 2232584 adds the functionality. Running the report updates table ROOSATTR.

entry.title: Bold text in adobe form
entry.content:
Hi Abapers ,

i have used smart styles in my adobe form to make my hypertext appear as bold in SO10 but when i try to execute my form from va23 the changes do not reflect and appear as <B>www.sap.com</> in my print i do not face this issue when i directly execute my adobe form using F8 i get my expected output. 

Please help me out with a solution on this. 

Regards,

Jess

entry.title: Re: Automatic account assignment category in purchase req...
entry.content:
Hi @jojos 
In my opinion, for non-valuated materials - Account assignment is mandatory at PR/PO.
so we may need to train users to enter 'K' with corresponding details. Please revert.
For any automatic/wonder scenarios, always go for a development (but need to understand how frequently we use this scenario and any cost impact about this process and ME51N performance check).

entry.title: Re: Self Billing Price change
entry.content:
Hello ,

 

I downloaded all items for this customer.

 

Case 1

25/07 First payment : 19128, 73 ( Qty of 382 for unit price of 42.08)

13/08 Second payment : 2822.94 (Qty of 382 for unit price of 48.29)

In SAP only the payment of 19128.73 was realized. The additional price of 2822.94 was not recognized

 

SAP should have create a negative line of 19128.73 to cancel out the initial amount and created a positive line of 21951.67

Case 2

25/07 First payment : 3467.48 ( Qty of 101 for unit price of 28.85)

13/08 Second payment : 670.66 (Qty of 101 for unit price of 34.43)

 

In SAP only the payment of 3467.48 was realized. The additional price of 670.66 was not recognized

entry.title: Fallback logical port for MDG BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateConfirmation_Out is not working
entry.content:
Hello experts, Need help on MDG SOAMANAGER Logical port setup for multiple target systems for Business Partner replications.

We are using MDG (S4 Private Cloud) SAP S/4HANA 2021 version, MDG_FND 806 for your reference and below are 2 main scenarios in scope.

1. ECC --> CPI <--> MDG <---> CFIN. (Existing Process)

This case ECC send BP request to MDG via CPI and after BP creation request, the confirmation message is sent back to CPI using CONFIRMATION_OUT. For this in MDG manual logical port is created which was working fine.

2. ARIBA SLP <---> MDG (New process in setup)

This case ARIBA Sends request to MDG, and related error confirmations/success message of BP# are sent back to ARIBA. For this process we have created logical port to ARIBA based on profile/provider system/DRF/WSDL process without using any default logical ports.

Now the issue comes with Confirmation_Out message where without setting the default logical port the message is not generating in srt_moni.

Recently we updated authentication to Certificate based for all outbound interfaces from MDG to ARIBA and Request_out message is working fine with Fallback logical port and for Confirmation_Out even with Fallback logical port , its not working and failing with original logical port and not using Fallback.

Fallback logical ports are created to manage message protocals like RM, Message id suppression etc.

Question1: For Confirmation_Out without marking default port, the interface is not generating and processing. Is there any solution if MDG wants to sent confirmations to multiple systems without using default port. Already checked the Receiver system and provider system names are matching.

Question 2: For Confirmation_Out , why Fallback logical port is not being used even though we created based on Service group and all parameters seems good.

FYI: SAP Confirmed that Confirmation_Out interface is not supported between MDG and ARIBA (works only for MDG and S4), but with internal enhancement we enabled this interface and working fine with id pwd authentication when setting default port.

SOAMANAGER screenshots are attached for references.

entry.title: Re: What is a Pacemaker Work center in capacity schedulin...
entry.content: Thanks Dominik for the quick reply. It's clear now

entry.title: Mass update of BSEG/STCEG?

entry.title: Re: How to solve simple requirement with RAP, Fiori Eleme...
entry.content: (2) Can't help with the Access Control Definition for the read access. But for "add, delete, create" you can define instance authorization checks where in the implementation you can decide on instance level which operations are allowed

entry.title: Re: Sales order with reference to quotations.
entry.content:
BAPIStructureFields 
BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2ORDER_HEADER_INDOC_TYPE 
  SALES_ORG 
  DISTR_CHAN 
  DIVISION 
 ORDER_HEADER_INXDOC_TYPEX
  SALES_ORGX
  DISTR_CHANX
  DIVISIONX
  UPDATEFLAGI
  Other parameter will Remain same  
 ORDER_PARTNERSPARTN_ROLE 
  PARTN_NUMB 
 ORDER_ITEMS_INITM_NUMBER 
  REF_DOC 
  REF_DOC_IT 
  REF_DOC_CAB
  Other parameter will Remain same (like MM,Route,Qty,plant ,Loading Grp etc) 
  ORDER_ITEMS_INXITM_NUMBERX
  UPDATEFLAGI
  REF_DOCX
  REF_DOC_ITX
  REF_DOC_CAB
  Other parameter will Remain same (like MM,Route,Qty,plant ,Loading Grp  etc)

entry.title: Re: How to solve simple requirement with RAP, Fiori Eleme...
entry.content: I can't see how your solution is covering this requirement:

entry.title: Re: BAPI: Create Sales order with reference to Quotation
entry.content:
Multiple Quotation one Order 

BAPIStructureFields 
BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2ORDER_HEADER_INDOC_TYPE 
  SALES_ORG 
  DISTR_CHAN 
  DIVISION 
 ORDER_HEADER_INXDOC_TYPEX
  SALES_ORGX
  DISTR_CHANX
  DIVISIONX
  UPDATEFLAGI
  Other parameter will Remain same  
 ORDER_PARTNERSPARTN_ROLE 
  PARTN_NUMB 
 ORDER_ITEMS_INITM_NUMBER 
  REF_DOC 
  REF_DOC_IT 
  REF_DOC_CAB
  Other parameter will Remain same (like MM,Route,Qty,plant ,Loading Grp etc) 
  ORDER_ITEMS_INXITM_NUMBERX
  UPDATEFLAGI
  REF_DOCX
  REF_DOC_ITX
  REF_DOC_CAB
  Other parameter will Remain same (like MM,Route,Qty,plant ,Loading Grp  etc)
